chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 353 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 06.11.2023 Mr. Muhammad Akram Jhamat, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General along with Inspector Faheem Naeem Abro, IO Police Station ‘B’ Section, Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- It is stated that applicant has been arrested in some other offence and is in jail, and therefore, learned Counsel for applicant does not press this bail application and submits that he would avail proper application for a remedy in accordance with law. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as not pressed in above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
